raw: {"perspective": "Security", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Builder script moved to archive directory but still referenced by live pipeline. code-index.json regeneration fails silently because path resolution points to archived, non-executable location. Empty output violates integrity of dependency mapping.", "recommended_fix": "Move code_index.py from archive/ back to active package directory. Add pipeline step to verify code-index.json non-emptiness post-build. Add CI check that scans for *.py files in archive/ and blocks execution if referenced in active configs."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Builder script moved to archive directory but still referenced by live pipeline. code-index.json regeneration fails silently because path resolution points to archived, non-executable location. Empty output violates integrity of dependency mapping.
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py from archive/ back to active package directory. Add pipeline step to verify code-index.json non-emptiness post-build. Add CI check that scans for *.py files in archive/ and blocks execution if referenced in active configs.
